instruction: Open Notes and create a note titled {TITLE} whose body is exactly {BODY}.
source:
cove-original (design 047 §4 OR composition); accepts the note body when it contains the gold (must_include) OR matches it under fuzzy normalization (fuzzy_match), tolerating the
/whitespace Notes injects into the body

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete (every note whose name is "{TITLE}")' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to make new note with properties {name:"{TITLE}", body:"{BODY}"}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Notes" to return body of first note whose name is "{TITLE}"
